steps.title: Spot the sequence
steps.content: The passage moves through pottery-making steps in order: “starts by creating the base,” then [blank], then “smooths out,” and “at last” paints. The language signals a forward progression through distinct stages.

steps.title: Match the motion
steps.content:
”Next,” marks the following action as the next step in the progression. The other three options introduce examples, contrasts, or reversals, none of which fit a linear sequence.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
